_comment: Registry of the surfaces that carry the single honest SZL Anatomy map. The scheduled sweep (workflows/anatomy-map-drift.yml -> scripts/anatomy_map_drift.py) fetches each surface and asserts the SAME honesty doctrine on all of them: the locked-proven ladder is EXACTLY the canonical_locked 8 {F1,F4,F7,F11,F12,F18,F19,F22}, and the Λ=Conjecture-1 label is present. The two surfaces that embed the byte-shared marker block (extract=marker_block: a11oy + killinchu) are additionally compared capability-for-capability so a one-sided edit to the capability/formula ladder is caught even when the locked-8 + Λ invariants still hold. The remaining surfaces are different renderings (extract=invariant_scan), so only the locked-8 + Λ invariants are asserted there. The full publish chain is now guarded end to end: the GitHub SOURCE deck (anatomy-src) -> the HF Space rendering (hf-anatomy) -> the live public site (a11oy-anatomy-mirror, kind=url, which serves its OWN built bundle and can drift via a stale nginx/CDN build even when both repos agree). Add a new surface by appending here -- no per-surface code (kinds: github | hf_space | url). Add a per-surface "ref" only if it tracks a non-main branch.
